page_content:
ARTT638 Sculpture (3 Credits)

Independent studies in sculpture for advanced special students. Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Art department.

Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.

ARTT648 Printmaking (3 Credits)

Independent studies in printmaking for advanced special students. Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Art department.

Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.
